ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "beats_per_minute" INTEGER /* Beats per minute of the song */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* Energy level of the song (0-100) */,
  "danceability" INTEGER /* Danceability of the song (0-100) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in dB */,
  "liveness" INTEGER /* Liveness of the song (0-100) */,
  "valence" INTEGER /* Valence of the song (0-100) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "acousticness" INTEGER /* Acousticness of the song (0-100) */,
  "speechiness" INTEGER /* Speechiness of the song (0-100) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song (0-100) */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the song */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the audio file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the audio file (e.g., MP3, FLAC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "biography_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the biography was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the genre's icon or image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, content creator, admin) */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "region" TEXT /* User's region or country */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's thumbnail image */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "playback_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the song appears in the playlist */,
  "is_skipped" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has been skipped by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., Remastered 2009) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the audio file */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the version */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the version */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_versions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite genre */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite artist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preference is currently active */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playback_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playback event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "played_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the playback in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the playback occurred */,
  "playback_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the playback (e.g., standard, high, lossless) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playback_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playback_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
